name: Flowering Kimono
description: Notes In addition to the effects listed in the item description, the Friendly Spirit summoned by this item explodes in a pink blast upon expiring, healing nearby players 40 HP regardless of its level.
effects: +120 MP, +10 DEF, +7 SPD, +12 WIS, +6% ATT equal to WIS

On Ability Use: Summon a Friendly Spirit which heals allies and zaps enemies for 150 damage/sec.The spirit synergizes in the presence of other spirits. Upgrade Levels: 1: Healing buff within 3 squares. 2: Healing buff and heals 10 HP/sec within 3 squares. 3: Healing buff and heals 20 HP/sec within 3 squares. Lifetime: 6 seconds Cooldown: 1.5 seconds
